title: kb.freshness.report v1
description: Emitted by kb at the end of a `kb freshness` staleness-report run (src/commands/freshness.rs:176). Summary only — does not include the per-item breakdown that the CLI's own stdout JSON carries. Source: /kb.

project.description: Project scope filter applied to the report, if any.

total_at_risk.description: Count of entries at risk of going stale.

stale_days.description: Staleness threshold (days) used for this report.
